mapper.sql: id, user_id, target_type, target_id, content, parent_id, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, target_type, target_id, content, parent_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 'VISIBLE')
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{id} AND (user_id = #{userId} OR #{userId} IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment
AND target_type = #{targetType}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{id}
